query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "memlens: benchmarking multimodal long-term memory in large vision-lang" computer science
rationale: The candidate paper is the foundational work ("MemLens") explicitly referenced in the user's research question title, establishing the empirical baseline and benchmarking framework for multimodal long-term memory in LVLMs that the user's follow-up study intends to extend. This satisfies acceptance criteria (c) as an empirical baseline and (d) as a canonical reference for the specific domain of multimodal memory benchmarking.
